name: Andrew Ma
bio: The authors are high school students from the Portland Metro Area and members of Youth Cyber Defender, a 501(c)(3) non-profit organization dedicated to youth cybersecurity education and service. They all have cybersecurity training for 3-5 years and have participated in cybersecurity competitions such as CyberPatriot and picoCTF. In the past two years, they focused their efforts on helping secure local businesses from cyberattacks.
